title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
